title: PlanetMosaicRecipe
description:
Cloud-masked composite from Planet imagery — NICFI Basemaps (free tropical, monthly), other Planet Basemaps (paid), or Planet Scope daily.

Pipeline: load `sources.assets` → filter AOI + dates → cloud-score mask above `options.cloudThreshold` (optionally buffered) → DAILY: optional histogram match → composite + indices.

**Threshold encoding.** `cloudThreshold` and `shadowThreshold` are **fractions in [0, 1]**, NOT percentages. GUI shows 0–100 and persists `1 − slider/100` (slider 85 → 0.15).

aoi.description: Area of interest. Supports EE table or polygon.

toDate.description: Exclusive. Scenes on toDate are NOT included. Full year 2024 → 2025-01-01 (NOT 2024-12-31).

sources.title: PlanetMosaicSources
sources.description: Planet collection. GUI has 3 buttons (NICFI / BASEMAPS / DAILY) but persists only 2 source values: NICFI is just `BASEMAPS` + the 3 NICFI asset ids. So model has `BASEMAPS` (NICFI or user basemap) or `DAILY`.

source.description: BASEMAPS = NICFI or user basemap collection. DAILY = Planet Scope daily.

assets.description: EE ImageCollection asset ids. NICFI: `['projects/planet-nicfi/assets/basemaps/africa', '…/asia', '…/americas']` (exact). Other basemaps / DAILY: user's asset id as single-element array.

cloudThreshold.description: Mask pixels with cloud score > this. Fraction in [0, 1]. Default 0.15 (GUI slider 85). Lower = more aggressive.

cloudBuffer.description: Buffer (m) around detected clouds: 0 / 120 / 600. Bigger buffer = much higher cost. Default 0; leave at 0 unless residual cloud edges hurt output.

histogramMatching.description: Match scenes to a reference. DAILY only; ignored for BASEMAPS. Default DISABLED.
